subcodes.first_line: In this day the people of God are those souls who, with the strength of certitude, have shattered the idols of vain imaginings and the might of rulers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز حزب الله نفوسی هستند که بعضد ایقان اصنام اوهام را شکستند سطوت امرا و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
